metadata.description: Spytrix AI plugin marketplace for Claude and Codex compatible coding-agent skills.

plugins.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
plugins.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution.

plugins.name: design-md
plugins.description: Agent guidance for creating, validating, and applying DESIGN.md visual identity specifications.

plugins.name: text2sql-framework
plugins.description: Agent guidance for building and using Text2SQL systems with tool-based schema exploration and scenario feedback loops.

plugins.name: create-agent-tui
plugins.description: Scaffold customizable TypeScript terminal UIs for OpenRouter agents using @openrouter/agent.

plugins.name: hyperbrowser-app-patterns
plugins.description: Curated agent guidance for building web automation and scraping apps from Hyperbrowser example patterns.

plugins.name: gastown-agent-orchestration
plugins.description: Agent guidance for operating Gas Town multi-agent orchestration across GitHub and GitLab org repositories: towns, rigs, convoys, crew, polecats, mail, nudges, and merge queues.
